Compatibility

System requirements

Windows: Windows 10, x64, 8 GB RAM recommended.

macOS: macOS 12, Apple Silicon or Intel, 8 GB RAM recommended.

Linux: Ubuntu 22.04 / equivalent, modern Wayland/X11 desktop, 8 GB RAM recommended.

Storage: 1.5 GB available space for the app, save data, and art packs.

Networking: Optional. Only required for cloud sync, hosted rooms, or release downloads.

TableTop Nexus

Offline-first board, card, and party games for polished desktop play.

Published by DigiSolUK. Need help? support@tabletopnexus.app
